headlines.description: Bayern Munich struck twice in the second half to earn a 2-0 win over Cologne on Saturday and bounce back from two straight league losses ahead of their Champions League return leg against Arsenal next week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern beat Cologne to stave off title handover

video.headline: Bayern Munich get two second-half goals for win over FC Cologne

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Bayern Munich get two second-half goals for win over FC Cologne) 2024/04/13 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart scored three times in 26 first-half minutes to ease past visitors Eintracht Frankfurt 3-0 on Saturday and remain third in the Bundesliga, level on points with second-placed Bayern Munich with five games remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stuttgart beat Frankfurt to stay on Bayern's heels

video.headline: Stuttgart strengthen top four position with win vs. Frankfurt

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (VfB Stuttgart vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - Game Highlights) 2024/04/13 ESHEET
